entries.text: Connected Threads (@bookedjob) + Telegram — both live; Threads token auto-refreshes.
Posted to Threads: Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
Connected Telegram (channel @bookedjobrobot bot → 'bookedjob' channel); first article posted.
Posted to Telegram: Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
Syndicated to Pinterest (backlink): Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
Published 3 new articles (pricing, Google reviews, slow season) — feed now 4 items for LinkedIn importer.
Connected Telegraph + Bluesky + Mastodon syndication (3 more surfaces); added rel=me Mastodon verification link.
Posted to Mastodon: Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
Posted to Bluesky: Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
Syndicated to Telegraph: Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
GitHub Pages canonical-mirror LIVE at contractors.webhd.com (aged-domain subdomain) — first article mirrored, dofollow links home.
Syndicated to GitHub Pages (canonical backlink): Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
Built the Google review machine: /review page + review-ask email (review_blast.py) + link-in-bio CTA. Ready once the Booked Job GBP is verified.
Dashboard self-updating: agent list now auto-derived from launchd plists; added IG followers + email subscribers stats/goals.
Instagram Reels connected (12th agent) — first IG Reel live on @bookedjob. Videos now fan out to FB Reels + YouTube Shorts + IG.
Email list + automated newsletter live: capture endpoint + weekly Resend digest (first send verified).
Sent weekly newsletter: Booked Job — Is Angi Worth It?
Tumblr connected (channel 3/4) — first syndication + backlink posted to booked-job.tumblr.com.
Syndicated to Tumblr (backlink): Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
Dropped the podcast channel (Spotify/Apple submission friction not worth it). Blogger syndication stays.
Launched the Booked Job podcast (ElevenLabs audio + RSS, hosted on-site). Episode 1 'Is Angi Worth It?' live; submit feed to Spotify/Apple once.
Syndicated to Blogger (backlink): Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Booked Job
Dashboard now multi-channel: live YouTube stats (subs/views/Shorts) + YouTube goals, and the Strategy panel rebuilt to reflect the full FB + YouTube + SEO/AEO research-backed plan.
Published YouTube Short: Is Angi Worth It for Contractors? The Real Cost Per Job
Built the autonomous YouTube Shorts channel (faceless video -> Data API upload, Mon/Wed/Fri) -- our strongest AI-citation signal. Awaiting channel + OAuth connect.
Launched SEO/AEO foundation: blog + 'Is Angi Worth It?' pillar with a True-Cost-of-an-Angi-Lead calculator, schema, robots/sitemap, and a contractor-story collector.
Set Month-1 targets (reasoned, leading-indicator weighted) and took ownership of growth — recalibrating weekly.
Activated the $7/day video-view campaign — live, promoting the Reel to build a retargeting pool.
Wired a non-expiring System User token across all automation (posts, Reels, ads) — nothing expires.
Built the paid-ads manager and staged the first campaign (broad US video-views) — paused for approval.
Published the first Reel — "3 ways shops bleed money" — voiced by ElevenLabs 'Torque Marshal'.
Built the faceless Reels engine: ElevenLabs voice → word-synced captions → ffmpeg → auto-publish.
Installed 4 autonomous agents (publisher, reels, engage, report) — running unattended on schedule.
Generated a 14-post content backlog + 5 Reel scripts across the high-performing trade archetypes.
Optimized the Facebook page (About, description, link) via API + generated brand profile & cover graphics.
Published the first post and verified the Graph API pipeline end-to-end.
Built & deployed the website — landing page + link-in-bio hub (hi-vis 'for the trades' identity).
Locked the growth strategy from real practitioner research (Reels = engine, owned Group = nurture, $5–10/day retargeting).
Brand created: Booked Job — an independent content brand for service pros, soft-funneling to Consent Resolve.
